name: Planet Hollywood Creole Mustard Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Creole style mustard,  see note
1 tablespoon green onions, sliced into 1/4 inch pieces
1 tablespoon crushed garlic packed in oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the mayonnaise and Creole style mustard.
2. Add the yellow mustard, horseradish, cider vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, red wine vinegar, water, cayenne pepper, and salt. Mix well.
3. Stir in the chopped green onions, crushed garlic packed in oil, finely chopped green bell pepper, celery, and onion.
4. Continue mixing until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
5. Adjust seasoning if needed to taste.
6. Transfer the sauce into a container and store in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.
